metadata.name: Issue Store Credit for a Return

description: A customer returns an item without a receipt and opts for store credit instead of a refund.

nodes.task_description: Identify the product being returned and its current selling price.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the product and its price.

nodes.task_description: Generate store credit for the value of the returned item.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a store credit voucher for the correct amount.

nodes.task_description: Add the store credit to the customer's account and email them the confirmation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully applies the credit and notifies the customer.
